309 GG0130C1_TOILT_ABILITY_STRT_CD GG0130C1_TOILT_ABILITY_STRT_CD GG0130C1 Admission Performance Toileting Hygiene Code - The data in this column indicates the patient's usual performance in their ability with toileting hygiene at the time of admission. CHAR 2
